creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Brand New 90s Cafe in NYC

*location is pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that there's a brand new 90s cafe in New York City with old CDs, video games that we all played, cool retro posters, blockbuster ads, a wall of nostalgic candy, 90s snacks, a pac-man machine, and even the food menu is from an old Windows computer where you can order fantastic milkshakes and sandwiches. This is dial-up days in Brooklyn.
